title: Recipe for Disaster: Freeing the Mountain Dwarf

startPoint.en: Inspect the mountain dwarf in the banquet hall in Lumbridge Castle.
startPoint.es: Inspecciona al enano de las montañas en el salón de banquetes del Lumbridge Castle.

quests.title: Recipe for Disaster: Another Cook's Quest

items.name: Coins
items.display: 304 coins (plus up to 30 more to buy the ales)

items.name: Bowl of water
items.display: Bowl of water (take bowl on table next to the Cook and fill it up in the sink)

items.name: Gloves
items.display: Gloves (Ice gloves are the best, but other gloves will work fine too)

items.name: Asgarnian ale
items.display: 4 Asgarnian ale (2 more recommended in case he sobers up, can be bought during the quest)

kills: Icefiend (Level 35) (Only if you don't have ice gloves)

text.en: Head to the Rising Sun Inn pub in Falador.
text.es: Dirígete al pub Rising Sun Inn en Falador.

text.en: Ask Emily about dwarves and ale (wear Ring of charos (a) if you have it).
text.es: Pregúntale a Emily sobre los enanos y la cerveza (equípate el Ring of charos (a) si lo tienes).

chatOptions: 2 What can you tell me about dwarves and ale?
2 I could offer you some in return, how about 200 gold?

text.es: Si llevas puesto el Ring of charos (a): La verdad es que soy bastante fiable una vez que me conoces.)

chatOptions: 2 What can you tell me about dwarves and ale?
3 (Persuade)I'm really quite trustworthy once you get to know me.

text.en: Add 1 gold coin to each glass of ale. (you can take coins out of your money pouch by right clicking the price checker in your inventory and selecting withdraw)
text.es: Añade 1 moneda de oro a cada vaso de cerveza. (puedes sacar monedas de tu bolsa de dinero haciendo clic derecho en el comprobador de precios de tu inventario y seleccionando retirar)

text.en: Head to the tunnel under White Wolf Mountain (cave north of Taverley lodestone).
text.es: Dirígete al túnel bajo White Wolf Mountain (cueva al norte de la piedra de viaje de Taverley).

text.en: Talk to the Old Dwarf, Rohak. You must finish this dialogue to proceed.
text.es: Habla con el Old Dwarf, Rohak. Debes terminar este diálogo para continuar.

text.en: Use 4 Asgoldian ales on him and then after the fade, talk to him.
text.es: Usa las 4 Asgoldian ale en él y luego, tras el desvanecimiento, habla con él.

text.en: You may need to repeat this process if you either: exit the cave before the next step, or do not give him the four ales quickly enough.
text.es: Puede que tengas que repetir este proceso si: sales de la cueva antes del siguiente paso, o no le das las cuatro cervezas con suficiente rapidez.

text.en: Talk to Rohak again to give him one-hundred coins, a bucket of milk, an egg, a pot of flour, and a bowl of water.
text.es: Vuelve a hablar con Rohak para darle cien monedas, un bucket of milk, un egg, un pot of flour y un bowl of water.

text.en: Quickly pick up the Dwarven rock cake whilst wearing gloves.
text.es: Recoge rápidamente el Dwarven rock cake mientras llevas puestos guantes.

text.en: If the cake is not picked up fast enough, the ingredients are required to make another one.
text.es: Si el pastel no se recoge lo bastante rápido, se necesitarán los ingredientes para hacer otro.

text.en: If ice gloves were worn whilst picking up the cake, simply return to Lumbridge.
text.es: Si llevabas puestos los ice gloves mientras recogías el pastel, simplemente regresa a Lumbridge.

text.en: If ice gloves were not worn, either drop the cake and pick it up with ice gloves equipped or kill an icefiend with it in your inventory.
text.es: Si no llevabas puestos los ice gloves, o bien suelta el pastel y recógelo con los ice gloves equipados, o mata a un icefiend teniéndolo en tu inventario.

text.en: Use the cooled rock cake on the Dwarf.
text.es: Usa el pastel enfriado en el Dwarf.
